articles.excerpt: Fuel sales in Gujarat surge 4-5 times due to panic buying, but government assures no shortage, with adequate LNG stocks and full PNG, CNG supply for consumers.
articles.content: Fuel sales across Gujarat have surged to four to five times normal levels over the past few days, driven by panic buying amid supply concerns, even as the state government maintained that there is no…

articles.title: United CEO tells Congress to end the shutdown: 'Please get the deal done soon'
articles.excerpt: United CEO Scott Kirby said that it's "unconscionable that our politicians haven't gotten this done."
articles.content:
The CEO of United Airlines has one request for Congress.
In an interview with CBS News, aired on Tuesday, United CEO Scott Kirby said it's "unconscionable" that US politicians haven't reached a deal…

articles.title: 10 lakh litres a day: Women SHGs lead dairy push in 31 UP districts
articles.excerpt: In addition to increasing production, this has resulted in generating a massive business of about ₹5,000 crore, a media statement from Uttar Pradesh govt stated
articles.content:
Women groups from 31 districts in Uttar Pradesh (UP) are collecting around 10 lakh litres of milk daily, according to the UP Government.
